query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM special_cases WHERE `procedure` LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR `procedure` LIKE '%part d''alta%' OR description LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR description LIKE '%part d''alta%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR examples LIKE '%part de baixa%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qC6e8XA9uYDpdWY.4aab5d30693d --database DirVLPm6UeFJi3utFGbgZe --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM special_cases WHERE `procedure` LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR `procedure` LIKE '%part d''alta%' OR description LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR description LIKE '%part d''alta%' OR legalBasis LIKE '%part de baixa%' OR examples LIKE '%part de baixa%'
